issues.description: Second effect object (Trigger with DrawCard and KO) does not match card text. Card only describes a Counter effect with conditional trash and power boost. No draw or KO mechanics are present in official text.
TrashFromHand should have maxCount:1 to enforce 'up to 1 card' constraint and be optional (optional:true)
Target scope should be 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' with maxTargets:1 to enforce 'Up to 1' limitation
